Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.geometry_building_type_recs" AS geometry_building_type_recs, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum((bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" - bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption") * bs.weight) AS elec_minus_gas FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs."in.state" IN ('CO', 'WY') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/9c573ce8833865da317bdd1525d2dfa2fbf1dfd80601040213100ba14dd5c1cb/6c4bc164-a77e-473e-8aaf-998025f8fba1/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
